title: Skills vs Prompts vs Tools：三种给 Claude 赋能的方式
title_en: Skills vs Prompts vs Tools: Three Ways to Empower Claude

body.itemA: Prompts（提示词）：在对话中直接给 Claude 的指令，属于一次性使用。每次新对话都需要重新提供。
body.itemB: Skills（技能）：存储在文件系统中的可复用领域专长，按需自动加载。创建一次，跨对话复用。

dimensions.name: 生命周期
dimensions.a: Prompts 只在当前对话有效
dimensions.b: Skills 持久存储，跨对话自动可用

dimensions.name: 加载方式
dimensions.a: Prompts 由用户手动输入或预设在 system prompt 中
dimensions.b: Skills 由 Claude 根据任务自动匹配加载

dimensions.name: 复杂度
dimensions.a: Prompts 适合简单、一次性的指令
dimensions.b: Skills 可封装完整的工作流、检查清单和领域知识

dimensions.name: 与 Tools 的关系
dimensions.b: Skills 告诉 Claude「如何做」，常常编排 Tools 的使用方式

body_en.itemA: Prompts: Direct instructions given to Claude in a conversation for one-off tasks. Must be re-provided in each new conversation.
body_en.itemB: Skills: Reusable domain expertise stored in the filesystem, automatically loaded on demand. Create once, reuse across conversations.

dimensions.name: Lifecycle
dimensions.a: Prompts live only in the current conversation
dimensions.b: Skills persist and are automatically available across conversations

dimensions.name: Loading
dimensions.a: Prompts are manually typed or preset in system prompts
dimensions.b: Skills are auto-matched and loaded by Claude based on the task

dimensions.name: Complexity
dimensions.b: Skills can package full workflows, checklists, and domain knowledge

dimensions.name: Relation to Tools
dimensions.b: Skills tell Claude 'how to do it', often orchestrating Tool usage
